title: Getting Go, the Go Doc Project
original_title: Getting Go: The Go Doc Project
overview: Too shy to make a proper introduction, a recent college grad devises to shoot a documentary about the NYC nightlife scene in order to meet the go-go guy he’s cyber-obsessed with.
